title: Besiktas Faces FC Midtjylland in Europa League Clash
description: The Europa League match between Besiktas and FC Midtjylland has caught the attention of Danish football enthusiasts, with thousands searching for information on how to watch the game live.

sections.heading: Match Details
paragraphs: The Europa League match between Besiktas and FC Midtjylland is a significant event for Danish football fans. According to Tipsbladet.dk, fans can watch the game live through various channels and streaming options.

sections.heading: Incident During the Match
paragraphs: TV2.dk reported an incident during the match where Friday Etim received a red card, which had significant consequences for FC Midtjylland.

sections.heading: Match Outcome
paragraphs: Bold.dk reported that FC Midtjylland suffered a loss in Turkey due to the red card incident, highlighting the impact of the red card on the game's outcome.

faq.q: How can Danish fans watch the Besiktas - FC Midtjylland match?
faq.a: According to Tipsbladet.dk, Danish fans have several options to watch the match live, including specific channels and streaming services.

faq.q: What happened during the Besiktas - FC Midtjylland match?
faq.a: TV2.dk reported that Friday Etim from FC Midtjylland received a direct red card, which played a crucial role in the match's proceedings.

faq.q: Did FC Midtjylland win or lose the match against Besiktas?
faq.a: Bold.dk stated that FC Midtjylland lost the match against Besiktas in Turkey, with the red card incident being a costly mistake.
